title: Universal Harness Engineering Workflow Specification
description: Defines the deterministic 6-stage operational lifecycle for developers and AI Agents within the Harness Engineering framework.

workflow_states.name: Task Intake & Specification Alignment
workflow_states.description: Parse requirement specifications, load active tickets, and verify acceptance criteria before writing code.
workflow_states.exit_condition: Ticket loaded and mapped to Business Requirements (BR) and Functional Requirements (FR).

workflow_states.name: Pre-mortem Risk Analysis & Contract Definition
workflow_states.description: Define the Definition of Done (DoD) in a contract and perform proactive failure analysis.
workflow_states.exit_condition: Contract Definition of Done checklist defined and Pre-mortem risks identified.

workflow_states.name: Test-Driven Development — Red Phase
workflow_states.description: Write automated failing unit tests conforming to the contract specification before writing business logic.
workflow_states.exit_condition: Failing test files created (.spec.ts) and Test-to-Code ratio sensor active.

workflow_states.name: Implementation & Hexagonal Architecture Conformance
workflow_states.description: Implement business logic strictly within decoupled Domain / Ports / Adapters layers until all tests pass.
workflow_states.exit_condition: Unit tests pass at 100% coverage and 0 Hexagonal Architecture violations.

workflow_states.name: Universal Quality Gates Execution
workflow_states.description: Execute harness-runner.py to verify all 6 quality gates across the entire codebase.

workflow_states.name: Knowledge Handoff & Progress Synchronization
workflow_states.description: Create immutable handoff report, capture lessons learned, and mark ticket/acceptance criteria as DONE.
workflow_states.exit_condition: Handoff recorded and repository state committed.
